Virudhunagar Outstation Cab — Book Now & Save 40%

Premium affordable outstation cab in Virudhunagar, Tamil Nadu. Pay only for one way — no return fare, no hidden charges. Trusted by 50,000+ happy travelers in 2026.

By booking, you agree to our Terms & Conditions.

Verified Drivers

24/7 Support

Clean Cars

Sanitized & well-maintained fleet.

Planning an outstation trip from Virudhunagar? Book your **affordable outstation cab** with OneWayTaxi.ai and enjoy hassle-free intercity travel across Tamil Nadu and all of South India. Our outstation cab service is designed for travelers who want the convenience of a private vehicle at the affordability of a one-way fare structure. ### Save on Intercity Travel Why choose OneWayTaxi.ai for outstation cabs from Virudhunagar? We eliminate the traditional round-trip billing model — you pay only for the distance from Virudhunagar to your destination. This makes our outstation cabs up to 40% cheaper than regular taxi services. Your fare includes driver allowance, toll charges, state permits, and GST. ### Fleet & Routes Top outstation routes from Virudhunagar: Virudhunagar to Madurai (62 km, ~₹868), Virudhunagar to Tirunelveli (100 km, ~₹1400), Virudhunagar to Coimbatore (280 km, ~₹3920). Our outstation cab fleet covers 115+ cities across 5 South Indian states with vehicles ranging from budget hatchbacks (₹13/km) to premium Innova Crysta (₹22/km). All vehicles are air-conditioned, clean, GPS-tracked, and driven by experienced, verified drivers who know the best highway routes.

Virudhunagar Outstation Cab — Route-wise Fare Details

Detailed fare breakdown for popular outstation cab routes from Virudhunagar, Tamil Nadu. All fares are one-way and include driver bata, toll, and GST.

Virudhunagar to Madurai Outstation Cab — ₹868 Onwards

62 km~1h 8m driveFrom ₹868

Book a one-way outstation cab from Virudhunagar to Madurai starting at just ₹868 for a hatchback (62 km × ₹13/km). Sedan fare: ~₹868. SUV/Innova fare: ~₹1178. The journey takes approximately 1h 8m via the most common highway route. All fares include driver allowance, toll charges, permit fees, and GST with zero hidden costs.

Mini (3+1): ₹806Sedan (4+1): ₹868Etios (4+1): ₹868Sedan (Non-CNG): ₹868

Virudhunagar to Tirunelveli Outstation Cab — ₹1400 Onwards

100 km~2h driveFrom ₹1400

Book a one-way outstation cab from Virudhunagar to Tirunelveli starting at just ₹1400 for a hatchback (100 km × ₹13/km). Sedan fare: ~₹1400. SUV/Innova fare: ~₹1900. The journey takes approximately 2h via the most common highway route. All fares include driver allowance, toll charges, permit fees, and GST with zero hidden costs.

Mini (3+1): ₹1300Sedan (4+1): ₹1400Etios (4+1): ₹1400Sedan (Non-CNG): ₹1400

Virudhunagar to Coimbatore Outstation Cab — ₹3920 Onwards

280 km~5h 5m driveFrom ₹3920

Book a one-way outstation cab from Virudhunagar to Coimbatore starting at just ₹3920 for a hatchback (280 km × ₹13/km). Sedan fare: ~₹3920. SUV/Innova fare: ~₹5320. The journey takes approximately 5h 5m via the most common highway route. All fares include driver allowance, toll charges, permit fees, and GST with zero hidden costs.

Mini (3+1): ₹3640Sedan (4+1): ₹3920Etios (4+1): ₹3920Sedan (Non-CNG): ₹3920

Virudhunagar Outstation Cab — Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about booking a outstation cab from Virudhunagar

The starting fare for outstation cab in Virudhunagar is ₹13/km for a hatchback. Sedan rates start at ₹14/km, SUV at ₹14/km, and Innova Crysta at ₹14/km. All fares include driver allowance, toll charges, and GST with no hidden costs.

You can book a outstation cab from Virudhunagar instantly on OneWayTaxi.ai. Simply enter your pickup location, destination, date, and time. You'll get an instant fare estimate. You can also call us 24/7 at +91 81244 76010 for immediate booking.

Yes, our outstation cab from Virudhunagar is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week — including holidays and late nights. You can book at any time through our website or by calling our support team.

We offer 5 vehicle types for outstation cab in Virudhunagar: Mini/Hatchback (4 seats, ₹13/km), Sedan like Etios/Dzire (4 seats, ₹14/km), SUV/Innova (7 seats, ₹14/km), Innova Crysta (7 seats, ₹14/km), and Tempo Traveller (12 seats, ₹19/km).

No, absolutely not. Our Virudhunagar outstation cab fares are fully transparent and include all costs — driver bata, toll charges, permit fees, and GST. The fare you see at booking is the fare you pay. There are no surge charges, no night charges, and no return-trip charges.

The outstation cab fare from Virudhunagar to Madurai starts at approximately ₹868 for a hatchback. The distance is about 62 km. Sedan fare would be around ₹868, and SUV around ₹868. Book now for exact pricing.

Yes, you can easily book a outstation cab in Virudhunagar for family members, friends, or colleagues. Just provide the passenger's name and contact number during booking. The driver will coordinate directly with the passenger for pickup.

Absolutely. All our Virudhunagar outstation cab drivers are professionally trained, background-verified, and carry valid licenses. Our vehicles are GPS-tracked in real-time, regularly serviced, and fully insured. We have served over 50,000 happy customers across South India with a 4.8-star average rating.

We accept multiple payment methods for Virudhunagar outstation cab: Cash, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit cards, debit cards, and net banking. You can pay the driver directly in cash or via UPI at the end of your trip. No advance payment is required for booking.

Yes, you can cancel your Virudhunagar outstation cab booking free of charge up to 2 hours before the scheduled pickup time. Cancellations within 2 hours may attract a nominal cancellation fee. Contact our 24/7 support at +91 81244 76010 for cancellations or rescheduling.

A one-way taxi from Virudhunagar to Tirunelveli costs approximately ₹1400 for a hatchback (100 km). Sedan fare: ~₹1400, SUV: ~₹1900. All fares include toll, driver bata, and GST.

“Excellent outstation cab from Virudhunagar! The driver was very professional and the car was clean and comfortable. Reached on time with no hassles. Will definitely book again.”

Virudhunagar to Madurai

“Best outstation cab service I've used in Tamil Nadu. The one-way pricing saved me almost 40% compared to other taxi services. Highly recommended for anyone traveling from Virudhunagar.”

Anitha Devi
Virudhunagar to Tirunelveli

“Very good experience with OneWayTaxi.ai's outstation cab from Virudhunagar. The booking process was quick and the fare was exactly as quoted. No hidden charges at all. The AC was working perfectly throughout the journey.”

Rajesh Kumar
Virudhunagar to Coimbatore

“I was skeptical about booking online but this outstation cab from Virudhunagar exceeded my expectations. The driver was punctual, courteous, and drove safely. Great value for money!”

Meera Krishnan
